question:
[Previous Feedback] The Q2 planning document requires P2 naming (20260402_*.md) and a P3 YAML frontmatter block (containing created_at in ISO 8601, author, and status).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create a team skills matrix in JSON format, saved to the day14/ directory. Record each team member's technical skill areas (frontend/backend/data/devops) and proficiency level (1–5), as well as last_updated (current time).

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 10:36 EDT] [Previous Feedback] The Q2 planning document requires P2 naming (20260402_*.md) and a P3 YAML frontmatter block (containing created_at in ISO 8601, author, and status).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create a team skills matrix in JSON format, saved to the day14/ directory. Record each team member's technical skill areas (frontend/backend/data/devops) and proficiency level (1–5), as well as last_updated (current time).

Created the team skills matrix JSON and saved it to:

- **`day14/20260402_team_skills_matrix.json`**

Contents include:
- Top-level `meta` (with `created_at`, `author`, `status`)
- Top-level `last_updated` in ISO 8601 (`+08:00`)
- Per-member skill proficiencies (1–5) across `frontend`, `backend`, `data`, `devops`, plus per-member `last_updated`
